messages.content: 中译英：我仍然记得，在上课时她似乎总是主动坐在第一排，表达出强烈的对知识的渴求，追求充分理解和掌握知识点。在课堂上她总是积极参与讨论，对于我提出的学术问题勤于思考，并能结合目前新媒体领域现状和课堂所学举一反三，很有逻辑且清晰地表达出自己的观点。特别是，在新媒体技术与应用课堂中，她对于“信息鸿沟”、“信息茧房”和“机器伦理”等问题有着深入的思考，在课堂上也能积极回答我提出的问题，并融合自己的思考，令我印象深刻。

I still remember that she always seemed to voluntarily sit in the front row during class, expressing a strong thirst for knowledge and a desire to fully understand and master the subject matter. She actively participated in classroom discussions and was diligent in contemplating upon academic questions I posed, often drawing connections between current trends in the field of new media and what we were learning in class. She had a logical and clear way of expressing her viewpoints. Particularly in the New Media Technology and Applications class, she demonstrated a deep reflection on issues such as "information divide," "information cocoon," and "machine ethics." She actively responded to my questions in class and incorporated her own thoughts, leaving a lasting impression on me.

润色如下内容：I still remember that she always seemed to voluntarily sit in the front row during class, expressing a strong thirst for knowledge and a desire to fully understand and master the subject matter. She actively participated in classroom discussions and was diligent in contemplating upon academic questions I posed, often drawing connections between current trends in the field of new media and what we were learning in class. She had a logical and clear way of expressing her viewpoints. Particularly in the New Media Technology and Applications class, she demonstrated a deep reflection on issues such as “information divide,” “information cocoon,” and “machine ethics.” She actively responded to my questions in class and incorporated her own thoughts, leaving a lasting impression on me.

I still vividly recall how she would always take the initiative to sit in the front row during class, displaying a strong eagerness for knowledge and a determination to fully comprehend and master the subject matter. She actively engaged in class discussions and diligently pondered upon the academic questions I posed, often making connections between the latest developments in the field of new media and our course material. Her ability to articulately express her viewpoints in a logical and coherent manner was remarkable. Especially in our New Media Technology and Applications class, she exhibited a profound contemplation of issues such as the "information divide," "information cocoon," and "machine ethics." She not only actively answered my questions in class but also integrated her own thoughts into her responses, leaving a lasting impression on me.

中译英：她的学习态度认真，勤奋努力，对于解决问题有着敏锐的洞察力和创造性思维，在课堂作业中她总是表现出色。尤其是在课堂汇报展示环节，她能够积极展现自己的思考，结合实例和课堂内容，给到听众精彩的反馈。在新闻编辑课堂上，她积极分享个人作业：分析文章“后真相时代的受众心理和媒体策略”提出自己的观点和感受，分析文章的语言风格、结构和逻辑。而在新媒体营销程中小组合作展示中，在小组内负责素材收集和整理部分，以“故宫博物院”为针对于故宫博物院在新媒体营销中的创新点，分析其市场营销的成功原因，结合课堂所学，以需求、内容和服务三个维度查找资料，为PPT制作的同学提供PPT制作的脉络思路。我非常欣赏她的团队合作能力。

She displayed a serious and diligent attitude towards her studies, showing a keen insight and creative thinking when it came to problem-solving. She consistently excelled in classroom assignments. Particularly impressive was her ability to actively present her thoughts and provide insightful feedback to the audience during class presentations. In our Journalism Editing class, she actively shared her analysis of an article titled "Audience Psychology and Media Strategies in the Post-Truth Era," offering her own perspectives and impressions while analyzing the language style, structure, and logic of the article.

Moreover, in our New Media Marketing group project, she took charge of collecting and organizing materials. Focusing on the Palace Museum (the Forbidden City) as an example of innovation in new media marketing, she analyzed the reasons behind its successful marketing strategies. By incorporating the knowledge and concepts learned in class, she conducted research from the perspectives of demand, content, and service, and provided valuable guidance to her teammates in constructing the structure and flow of their presentation materials. I highly appreciate her ability to collaborate effectively within a team.

润色如下内容：She displayed a serious and diligent attitude towards her studies, showing a keen insight and creative thinking when it came to problem-solving. She consistently excelled in classroom assignments. Particularly impressive was her ability to actively present her thoughts and provide insightful feedback to the audience during class presentations. In our Journalism Editing class, she actively shared her analysis of an article titled “Audience Psychology and Media Strategies in the Post-Truth Era,” offering her own perspectives and impressions while analyzing the language style, structure, and logic of the article.

Moreover, in our New Media Marketing group project, she took charge of collecting and organizing materials. Focusing on the Palace Museum (the Forbidden City) as an example of innovation in new media marketing, she analyzed the reasons behind its successful marketing strategies. By incorporating the knowledge and concepts learned in class, she conducted research from the perspectives of demand, content, and service, and provided valuable guidance to her teammates in constructing the structure and flow of their presentation materials. I highly appreciate her ability to collaborate effectively within a team.

She exhibited a conscientious and diligent approach to her studies, demonstrating a sharp insight and creative thinking when tackling problems. She consistently excelled in completing class assignments. Particularly remarkable was her ability to actively express her thoughts and offer insightful feedback during class presentations. In our Journalism Editing class, she actively shared her analysis of an article titled "Audience Psychology and Media Strategies in the Post-Truth Era," presenting her own viewpoints and impressions while dissecting the article's language style, structure, and logic.

Furthermore, in our New Media Marketing group project, she took the lead in gathering and organizing materials. Using the Palace Museum (the Forbidden City) as an exemplar of new media marketing innovation, she examined the factors contributing to its successful marketing strategies. Leveraging the knowledge and concepts learned in class, she conducted research from the angles of demand, content, and service, providing valuable guidance to her team in crafting a cohesive structure and flow for their presentation materials. I genuinely admire her capacity to collaborate effectively within a team.
中译英：她在新媒体营销期末考试中撰写的小论文让我眼前一亮。（包含研究目的、研究意义、研究过程等）《新冠疫情（2019年~2022年）期间Keep软件中健身课程和健身器材购买用户偏好研究》思路清晰、逻辑严谨、对于文科生来讲统计学方面的数据分析能力略显不足，思维还比较局限，但所写文章也可以展现平时在学习课堂知识的同时也积累了相关文献的阅读。

Her essay in the final exam of New Media Marketing caught my attention. Titled "A Study on User Preferences for Fitness Classes and Equipment Purchases in the Keep App during the COVID-19 Pandemic (2019-2022)", the paper demonstrated a clear train of thought, rigorous logic, and research process. Although her statistical analysis skills, typically associated with data analysis, were somewhat lacking for a humanities student, and her thinking appeared to be somewhat limited, the paper showcased her ability to integrate the knowledge learned in class with relevant literature she had accumulated through reading.

润色如下内容：Her essay in the final exam of New Media Marketing caught my attention. Titled “A Study on User Preferences for Fitness Classes and Equipment Purchases in the Keep App during the COVID-19 Pandemic (2019-2022)”, the paper demonstrated a clear train of thought, rigorous logic, and research process. Although her statistical analysis skills, typically associated with data analysis, were somewhat lacking for a humanities student, and her thinking appeared to be somewhat limited, the paper showcased her ability to integrate the knowledge learned in class with relevant literature she had accumulated through reading.

Her essay for the final exam in New Media Marketing truly impressed me. Titled "A Study on User Preferences for Fitness Classes and Equipment Purchases in the Keep App during the COVID-19 Pandemic (2019-2022)", the paper displayed a clear and logical thought process, rigorous reasoning, and a well-structured research methodology. Although her statistical analysis skills, typically associated with data analysis, were slightly lacking for a humanities student, and her thinking seemed somewhat limited, the paper still highlighted her capability to incorporate the knowledge acquired in class with the applicable literature she had accumulated through extensive reading.
中译英：她在考试中的成绩非常优秀，无论是平时小测验还是期末考试，总是能够取得令人瞩目的成绩，在校期间因此也曾多次获得奖学金。
She achieved outstanding results in exams, both in regular quizzes and the final exam. Her consistently impressive performance throughout her time at school earned her multiple scholarships.
润色如下内容：She achieved outstanding results in exams, both in regular quizzes and the final exam. Her consistently impressive performance throughout her time at school earned her multiple scholarships

She achieved remarkable scores in exams, excelling in both regular quizzes and the final exam. Her consistently impressive academic performance throughout her schooling earned her multiple scholarships.

润色如下内容：I appreciate her dedication to pursuing improvement and her constant quest for advanced-level knowledge. As a teacher who knows her very well, I unreservedly recommend her to your esteemed university. Thanks for your favorable consideration.

I highly value her commitment to personal growth and her relentless pursuit of knowledge at an advanced level. As her teacher, having had the opportunity to know her well, I wholeheartedly recommend her to your esteemed university without reservation. Thank you for your careful consideration.
